name: Noodle Nibbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter, soy sauce, and hot sauce in a bowl.
2. Drizzle the mixture over the noodles until they are well coated.
3. Sprinkle with celery salt and onion powder.
4. Toss everything together to mix well.
5. Spread the mixture on a shallow baking sheet.
6. Bake at 275 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
